name: Auto Deafen for Eclipse
description: Press Left Shift in-game to configure automatic deafen and undeafen percentages plus the voice-app keybind.

enabled.name: Auto Deafen
enabled.description: Enable automatic deafen/undeafen while playing a level.

shortcut-vk.name: Shortcut virtual-key code
shortcut-vk.description: Windows virtual-key code sent to your voice app. F8 is 119.

deafen-percent.name: Deafen at (%)
deafen-percent.description: Press the shortcut when progress first reaches this percentage.

undeafen-percent.name: Undeafen at (%)
undeafen-percent.description: Press the shortcut again when progress first reaches this percentage.
